title: [lichen_l2.c:1586] src_eui64 initialization may hide authentication bugs
description: src_eui64 is defensively initialized to all zeros at line 1586. However, on success of peer_try_all_pubkeys, src_eui64 should be filled by lichen_link_rx(). If there's a bug where src_eui64 is NOT filled on success, the defensive initialization means we'll log/use a zero address without detecting the bug. Consider removing the initialization and adding an explicit check that src_eui64 is not all-zeros after successful authentication, or at least a debug assertion.
close_reason: Fixed: Removed zero-initialization of src_eui64 to make bugs visible if peer_try_all_pubkeys returns success without setting it
